meaning: n.剧场,戏院,电影院,阶梯教室,手术教室,手术室,全体观众,戏剧
examples: I grew up in a dinky little town that didn't even have a movie theater.
The Stratford is the largest repertory theater in North America and one of the most successful.
The center offers dance, theater, visual arts and voice classes, and annually serves more than 50, 000 residents.
